title: Waste Metric Dashboard: September 2025
body: "The National Waste Programme publishes a range of waste metrics to track progress and ensure that expected programme benefits are being delivered.  The metrics demonstrate:   the successful diversion of waste away from disposal to the LLW Repository the optimal use of key national assets, such as the LLWR Site and waste treatment facilities the safety and environmental performance of the National Programme  "

taxons.title: Radioactive and nuclear substances and waste
